findings.description: The candidate rule aggregates three highly distinct callout styles (Main, Secondary, and Text-heavy) with highly specific parameters (such as color codes, padding values, border/line widths, and layout rules) into a single monolithic rule. This should be split to ensure precise governance and easy compliance testing of each layout style.

split_rules.description: Main callout key points must use centered bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) 2px horizontal rules (width 60–100% of text block) above and below, with 16px padding between rule and text. Do not feature two competing callouts of this same style on a single screen/section.

Secondary/data callouts must use a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue text and optional line icon. Must adhere to 20px internal padding and corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

Text-heavy callouts must use a Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, with Bold Brand Blue headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, and Regular Graphite (#212121) body text. Must feature 24px internal padding and a two-column icon+text layout that collapses to a single column on mobile screens.
